bead.title: benchmark page: improve table, chart, and responsive layout
bead.description:
PROBLEM
The generated TerminalBench benchmark pages are dense tables and charts. Review reopened this bead because the previous acceptance relied on a manual 390px responsive check that was not automated or recorded.

CURRENT STATE
Benchmark-specific styling is in `website/assets/css/custom.css`. The four affected pages are `/benchmarks/terminal-bench-2-1/`, `/benchmarks/terminal-bench-2-1/models/`, `/benchmarks/terminal-bench-2-1/harnesses/`, and `/benchmarks/terminal-bench-2-1/providers/`. Child bead `fizeau-900d260b` owns the repeatable 390px verification.

PROPOSED FIX
Make the minimal benchmark CSS/layout adjustments required so dense benchmark tables, charts, readouts, and labels remain usable on mobile. This bead should close only after the responsive verification child has landed and the website still builds.

IN-SCOPE FILES
- `website/assets/css/custom.css`
- benchmark page markup only if required to support responsive styling hooks

NON-SCOPE
- `scripts/benchmark/generate-report.py`
- `docs/benchmarks/sections/*.md`
- Generated benchmark data or expensive benchmark execution
bead.acceptance:
1. `cd website && go test ./... -run TestBenchmarkPagesFitAt390px -count=1` passes after the CSS/layout changes.
2. `cd website && go test ./... -count=1` passes.
3. `cd website && hugo --quiet` passes.
4. `uv run --with matplotlib --with pyyaml --with markdown python scripts/benchmark/generate-report.py` passes if the benchmark markdown or generated report inputs are changed; otherwise the worker records that no regeneration was needed.

events.summary: review could not verify responsive AC
